elements.text: You're sitting on a bench and getting some fresh air when you notice your arms start moving. Just then, you hear someone call your name and look up to see your neighbors walking by. You wonder if they've noticed your movements, then decide to continue enjoying the...

elements.name: enjoying_the_outdoors--early_mid-stage_symptoms--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
